title: Sylvan Regrowing Sapling: legacy backlog batch 14 dispositioned
body: Closed claim 7d011543 after processing legacy backlog batch 14 in place. Dispositions: 3 duplicate, 2 owner-gated. Also routed live hard-fitness drift: definition-of-delivery prose width is healthy and repo-continuity is back under hard limit by compacting stale implementation detail into a thread-record pointer. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, collaboration-state check ok, strict-hard SOFT with 20 soft, 24 healthy, 7 ready empty, hard 0, critical 0. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
